evidence: graph query 'screens lacking error recovery' returns screen-task-board
src/screens/TaskBoard.tsx renders data and skeleton but has no error branch or retry affordance
violates governance/design-genome/enterprise-pm-genome.json#error_patterns ('every async surface declares loading, empty, and error states')
remediation: Add an error state to the Task Board: non-blocking banner with retry that preserves board filters and in-progress selections, per the genome error_patterns. Add a has-state edge from screen-task-board to state-error and cover it with an error-recovery test.
